name: bubble-pop-chain
description: Bubble Pop Chain — mobile PWA puzzle game

scripts.android:sync: npm run build:web && cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && cap open android
scripts.android:build: npm run android:sync && JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home}"; export JAVA_HOME PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:release: npm run android:sync && JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home}"; export JAVA_HOME PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:bundle: npm run android:sync && JAVA_HOME="${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home}"; export JAVA_HOME PATH="$JAVA_HOME/bin:$PATH"; cd android && ./gradlew bundleRelease
scripts.ios:sync: npm run build:web && cap sync ios
scripts.ios:open: npm run ios:sync && cap open ios
scripts.ios:build: npm run ios:sync && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -derivedDataPath ios/App/build CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO
scripts.ios:archive: npm run ios:sync && xcodebuild -workspace ios/App/App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -archivePath ios/App/build/Bubblit.xcarchive archive
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
